item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Perbedaan nilai antar budaya tidak selalu berarti salah satu lebih benar daripada yang lain, tetapi penting untuk saling memahami konsep keadilan yang berbeda.

notes: Agent A starts with clear support for society/community priority, then moderates into a culturally relative balance frame while still saying Indonesian policy often centers public interest. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, with only bounded acknowledgments that collective goals and public interest exist. Agent A includes minor English lexical mixing in Indonesian turns, e.g. "individual rights".
